creator: super_gromit@hotmail.com
text:
i have rev-c of this device but its not listed in usbdevs as a result the serial ports do not show up and it is unable to be used with u3g

 idVendor = 0x2001
 idProduct = 0x7d0e 

the older rev-b is in usbdevs

vendor DLINK		0x2001	D-Link
product DLINK DWM157	0x7d02  DWM-157

i made an edit to the product in /usr/src/sys/dev/usb/usbdevs and recompiled the kernel and it was then detected by u3g could this be added please
